scripts.compact: npm run gen && compact compile src/game2.compact ./src/managed/game2 && rm -rf ../../../../frontend/src/contract/src/managed/game2 && cp -R ./src/managed/game2 ../../../../frontend/src/contract/src/managed/ && cp ./src/game2.compact ../../../../frontend/src/contract/src/game2.compact
scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc --project tsconfig.build.json && cp -Rf ./src/managed ./dist/managed && cp ./src/game2.compact ./dist
